title: tater - coarse breast label
description: Assign a coarse pathology label to breast pathology reports using the FDX classification ontology.
instructions:
## Instructions

For each report, assign:
1. **Diagnosis** — navigate the FDX ontology to select the primary pathological entity. Use search to find a term quickly.
2. **Laterality** — the affected side(s) as stated in the report.
3. **Notes** — optional free text for edge cases or ambiguity.

widget.label: Diagnosis
widget.description: Select the primary pathological diagnosis from the FDX ontology.

widget.label: Notes
widget.description: Optional notes on ambiguity or edge cases.
